reasoning: The ISO27001 A.8.24 control focuses on the use of cryptography to protect data. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to ensuring that Secrets are encrypted at rest, etcd (which stores cluster data) is encrypted, Ingress resources use TLS for secure communication, and service meshes like Istio or Linkerd enforce mutual TLS (mTLS) for secure pod-to-pod communication.
title: Use of Cryptography
